ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-27-2022 Continued To Aug-24-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jennifer Jaynes, for Jennifer Corry and Colleen Kellison, Co-Administrators.

Counsel confirms that there had been an issue with the Inventory and Appraisal (I&A) which caused the delay, but it is now ready to file. Counsel offers a status of the matter and advises that a petition is ready to file but there are a pending creditors claim.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to Aug-24-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
